docket_entries.description: ORIGINAL NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ON SISTER-STATE JUDGMENT AND PROOF OF SERVICE ON APPLICATION AND NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ON SISTER-STATE JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100044447) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WEIN, BERNIE SERVED APR-11-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HELLER, DANETTE PROCESS COMPLETED BY DEFAULT SECTION. WRIT MAY ISSUE ON MAY-13-2019 IF NO MOTION FILED BY DEFENDANT
APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF WEIN, BERNIE AS TO DEFENDANT HELLER, DANETTE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WEIN, BERNIE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HELLER, DANETTE $87,420.00 PRINCIPAL, $35.00 INTEREST, $450.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $87,905.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
